name: !stop
description: Force stop all actions and commands that are currently executing.

name: !goToCoordinates
description: Go to the given x, y, z location within the given closeness value.

closeness.recommended_use: Use as large of a closeness value to maximize the chance of success. Closeness values near 1 are much more likely to fail than larger closeness values.

horizontal_distance_from_current_positio.description: The target x/z coordinate must be within 250 horizontal blocks of the agent's current x/z position.

name: !goToXZ
description: Go to the given x, z column within the given closeness value. The bot chooses the cheapest y. Prefer this over !goToCoordinates when the y coordinate does not matter — it is faster, more likely to succeed, and more likely to stay on the overworld in a safe location.

closeness.recommended_use: Use as large of a closeness value to maximize the chance of success. Closeness values near 1 are much more likely to fail than larger closeness values.

horizontal_distance_from_current_positio.description: The target x/z coordinate must be within 250 horizontal blocks of the agent's current x/z position.

name: !search
description: Search for the nearest block or entity of a given type by sweeping radii 32, 64, 128, 256 from the bot's current position, if found the agent attempts to move to the nearest target.

constraints.target_must_be_concrete: Pass concrete block or entity names, e.g. "chicken", "diamond_ore" or abstract category names, e.g. "any_log" when appropriate.
constraints.exhaustion_is_terminal: If a previous !search for the same target returned 'search_exhausted', re-issuing !search from the same position will fail identically. Relocate first before searching again.
constraints.no_repeat_in_sequence: A second !search for the same target inside one recovery action sequence will short-circuit to 'search_already_attempted'.

name: !moveAway
description: Move a short distance away for unsticking or repositioning only. Direction is unpredictable — the bot goes wherever terrain is easiest and cannot be steered. Never use for: going up/down, reaching a specific place, finding blocks/entities, or relocating after a failed search.

distance.note: Large distances can send the bot toward unintended low-cost locations such as bedrock. Prefer 8-16 for unsticking; use 32 only for escaping a local obstruction.

constraints.not_for_search_relocation: Do not use !moveAway as the main relocation strategy after search_exhausted. Use !goToCoordinates with a bounded target instead.

name: !collectBlocks
description: Collect the nearest blocks of a given type. Only works if the block is currently present in the state.
recommended_use: Use only after !search succeeds for the same block type, or when the block is already visible in nearby.blocks.

constraints.do_not_use_after_failed_search: If !search for this block returned search_exhausted from the current position, !collectBlocks will not help.

name: !craftRecipe
description: Craft the given recipe a given number of times.

recipe_name.note: The OUTPUT item to craft (e.g. 'oak_planks' to craft planks), not the inputs.

constraints.crafting_table_placement_requires_free_s: If no crafting_table is already placed nearby, one is auto-placed from inventory. Placement requires open space next to a buildable surface; it will fail in tight or confined spots (cramped caves, surrounded by unmineable blocks, etc.). If a craft fails with 'Failed to place crafting_table at (x, y, z)', relocate to a more open area before retrying.

name: !smeltItem
description: Smelt the given item the given number of times.

item_name.note: The INPUT item to smelt (e.g. 'raw_iron' produces iron_ingot), not the output.

name: !clearFurnace
description: Take all items out of the nearest furnace.

name: !placeHere
description: Place a given block in the current location. Do NOT use to build structures, only use for single blocks/torches.

name: !attack
description: Attack and kill the nearest entity of a given type. Only works if the target entity is currently present in the state.
recommended_use: Use only after !search succeeds for the same entity type, or when the entity is already visible in nearby.entityTypes.

constraints.do_not_use_after_failed_search: If !search for this entity returned search_exhausted from the current position, !attack will not help.

name: !goToBed
description: Go to the nearest bed and sleep. Only works if a bed is within the state. If the bed is in the inventory it should be put down first.

name: !stay
description: Stay in the current location no matter what. Pauses all modes.

seconds.note: -1 means forever; use only when intentionally stopping the agent indefinitely.

name: !digDown
description: Digs down a specified distance. Stops if it reaches lava, water, or a fall >=4 blocks below the bot.

constraints.do_not_use_for_navigation: Do not use to reach distant targets or escape failed surface searches.

name: !goToSurface
description: Moves the bot to the highest block above it, usually the surface.

name: !goToNearestLand
description: If the bot is in water, navigate to the nearest standable land within 500 blocks. No-op success if already on land. Use to relocate after wandering into water.
recommended_use: Call when in water or after a call to !goToCoordinates or !goToXZ to ensure the agent is on land.

name: !useOn
description: Use, right click, the given tool on the nearest target of the given type.
